Thanks for contributing to Skiff! Please fill this in and delete the comments.
For anything larger than a small fix, please open an issue first.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the issue it closes, if any. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / performance
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt-check` passes (code is gofmt-clean)
- [ ] `make vet` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes, with tests added/updated where it makes sense
- [ ] I rebuilt and committed the embedded dashboard (`make dash`) — *only if I
      changed anything under `web/dash/`*
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or server addresses in the diff

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI. -->
